member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder
member.summary: Provides helper methods for building ADO.NET command parameters.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder.AddParameter(System.Data.Common.DbCommand,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a named input parameter to the specified .
member.param: The command to add the parameter to.
The parameter name. An '@' prefix is added automatically if missing.
The parameter value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder.AddOutputParameter(Npgsql.NpgsqlCommand,System.String,NpgsqlTypes.NpgsqlDbType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a named output parameter to the specified .
member.param: The Npgsql command to add the parameter to.
The parameter name.
The Npgsql data type of the parameter.
The maximum size of the parameter value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Ado.Parameters.CommandParameterBuilder.GetParameter(Npgsql.NpgsqlCommand,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the value of the named output parameter from the specified .
member.param: The Npgsql command containing the parameter.
The name of the parameter to retrieve.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration
member.summary: Provides methods for registering EF Core entity types with the PostgreSQL model builder.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.GetPrimaryKeyType(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the primary key type for an entity that inherits from BaseEntity
Registers auditable entities with the ModelBuilder, applying base configurations, custom schema/table names, and optional specific entity configurations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.IsAssignableToGenericType(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Helper method to check if a type is assignable to a generic type definition

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with default conventions and base configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithSchemas(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String}[])
member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schemas for specified types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithNames(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.ValueTuple{System.Type,System.String,System.String}[])
member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schema and/or table names for specified types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityRegistration.RegisterEntitiesWithCustomConfigurations(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.Type,System.Type},System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with specific custom configurations.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1
member.summary: Base configuration class for Entity Framework Core entity type configurations. Provides common configuration for entities inheriting from .

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the entity type.
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigurePrimaryKey(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the primary key for the entity.
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureTimestamps(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures timestamp properties (CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, DeletedAt).
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureStatusFields(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures status-related boolean fields (IsActive, IsDeleted, IsMobileRequest).
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureExternalUserTracking(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures external user tracking fields (CreatedBy, UpdatedBy, DeletedBy).
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureSoftDeleteAndIndexes(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures soft delete query filter and indexes.
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.BaseEntityTypeConfiguration`1.ConfigureIndexes(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures database indexes for the entity, including standard and partial indexes.
member.param: The builder used to configure the entity type.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.EntityTypeConfiguration`1
member.summary: Base configuration for non-auditable entities.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.EntityTypeConfiguration`1.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the primary key for the entity.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration
member.summary: Provides methods for registering simple entities with the Entity Framework ModelBuilder, supporting custom schema/table names and entity configurations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.GetPrimaryKeyType(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the primary key type for an entity that inherits from Entity<TKey>
Registers non-auditable entities with the ModelBuilder, applying base configurations, custom schema/table names, and optional specific entity configurations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.HasIdProperty(System.Type)
member.summary: Helper method to check if a type has an Id property (for simple entities)

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.GetIdPropertyType(System.Type)
member.summary: Helper method to get the type of the Id property

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityRegistration.RegisterEntities(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Registers entities with default conventions and base configuration.

member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schemas for specified types.

member.summary: Registers entities, explicitly setting schema and/or table names for specified types.

member.summary: Registers entities with specific custom configurations.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityTypeConfiguration`1
member.summary: Base configuration for simple entities that don't inherit from BaseEntity.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Configurations.SimpleEntityTypeConfiguration`1.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Configures the primary key and identity column for the simple entity.
member.param: The entity type builder.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext
member.summary: Base context class for Entity Framework Core database contexts with support for domain events, auditing, and soft deletes.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions)
member.summary: Base context class for Entity Framework Core database contexts with support for domain events, auditing, and soft deletes.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions,Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEventDispatcher)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with domain event dispatcher.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.
The domain event dispatcher for handling domain events.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions,Acontplus.Core.Domain.Common.Events.IDomainEventDispatcher,Acontplus.Core.Abstractions.Context.IAuditContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with domain event dispatcher and audit context.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.
The domain event dispatcher for handling domain events.
The audit context for tracking user information.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions,Acontplus.Core.Abstractions.Context.IAuditContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with audit context.
member.param: The options to be used by the DbContext.
The audit context for tracking user information.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.SaveChangesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all changes, dispatches domain events, updates audit fields, and handles soft deletes asynchronously.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The number of state entries written to the database.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.SaveChanges
member.summary: Saves all changes, dispatches domain events, updates audit fields, and handles soft deletes synchronously.
member.returns: The number of state entries written to the database.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the model by applying global soft-delete filters and date-time conversions.
member.param: The model builder used to construct the model for the context.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Context.BaseContext.ConfigureDateTimeProperties(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Applies UTC-aware value converters to all and DateTime properties.
member.param: The model builder.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.DependencyInjection.PostgresServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering PostgreSQL persistence services with the DI container.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.DependencyInjection.PostgresServiceCollectionExtensions.EnsureResilienceOptionsRegistered(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Ensures PersistenceResilienceOptions is registered with default values. Called internally by persistence registration methods. To configure from appsettings.json, add this in your Startup/Program.cs: services.Configure<PersistenceResilienceOptions>(configuration.GetSection("Persistence:Resilience"));

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.DependencyInjection.PostgresServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPostgresPersistence``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder},System.Object)
member.summary: Registers a PostgreSQL DbContext and its corresponding UnitOfWork implementation, optionally with a service key using .NET 8+ keyed DI. Also registers IAdoRepository which is required by UnitOfWork.
member.param: The IServiceCollection.
The PostgreSQL-specific options for DbContext.
Optional key to register the services with (for keyed DI).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.DependencyInjection.PostgresServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPostgresDapperRepository(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object)
member.summary: Registers the Dapper repository for PostgreSQL with resilience policies. Can be used independently or alongside Entity Framework Core.
member.param: The IServiceCollection.
Optional key to register the service with (for keyed DI).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.DependencyInjection.PostgresServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPostgresAdoRepository(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Object)
member.summary: Registers the ADO.NET repository for PostgreSQL with resilience policies. Can be used independently or alongside Entity Framework Core.
member.param: The IServiceCollection.
Optional key to register the service with (for keyed DI).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionHandler
member.summary: Handles PostgreSQL exceptions by mapping them to domain error types.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionHandler.IsTransientException(Npgsql.NpgsqlException)
member.summary: Determines whether the exception represents a transient PostgreSQL error.
member.param: The Npgsql exception to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the error is transient and the operation can be retried.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionHandler.MapSqlException(Npgsql.NpgsqlException)
member.summary: Maps a to a domain error descriptor.
member.param: The Npgsql exception to map.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionHandler.HandleSqlException(Npgsql.NpgsqlException,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs and throws a as a .
member.param: The Npgsql exception to handle.
The logger to write the error details to.
A description of the operation that failed.
The name of the calling member (auto-populated).

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionTranslator
member.summary: Translates PostgreSQL exceptions into domain exceptions.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionTranslator.IsTransient(System.Exception)
member.summary: Determines whether the exception represents a transient PostgreSQL error.
member.param: The exception to evaluate.
member.returns: true if the error is transient and the operation can be retried.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionTranslator.Translate(System.Exception)
member.summary: Translates an exception into a .
member.param: The exception to translate.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.PostgresExceptionTranslator.FindNpgsqlException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Recursively searches for NpgsqlException in the exception chain

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an error occurs within the UnitOfWork operations.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Exceptions.UnitOfWorkException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Mapping.DataTableNameMapper
member.summary: Provides utilities for assigning table names in a from a stored procedure output parameter.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Mapping.DataTableNameMapper.ProcessTableNames(Npgsql.NpgsqlCommand,System.Data.DataSet)
member.summary: Assigns table names from the @tableNames command parameter to the corresponding tables in the .
member.param: The Npgsql command containing the @tableNames parameter.
The data set whose tables will be renamed.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper
member.summary: Provides extension methods for mapping results to strongly-typed objects.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper.ToListAsync``1(System.Data.Common.DbDataReader,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Maps a DbDataReader to a List of entities of type T with support for records and init-only properties

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper.ToList``1(System.Data.Common.DbDataReader)
member.summary: Synchronously maps all rows from the data reader to a list of .
member.typeparam: The target type to map each row to.
member.param: The data reader positioned before the first row.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Mapping.DbDataReaderMapper.MapToObject``1(System.Data.Common.DbDataReader)
member.summary: Maps a single row from a SqlDataReader to an object of type T using reflection.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository
member.summary: Provides ADO.NET data access operations with retry policy and optional transaction sharing. Enhanced with PostgreSQL error handling, domain error mapping, and flexible filter parameter strategies. Optimized for PostgreSQL with high-performance, scalable operations.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Lazy-loaded retry policy based on configuration.
Constructor for AdoRepository with resilience configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.SetTransaction(System.Data.Common.DbTransaction)
member.summary: Sets the current database transaction from the Unit of Work.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.SetConnection(System.Data.Common.DbConnection)
member.summary: Sets the current database connection from the Unit of Work.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.ClearTransaction
member.summary: Clears the current transaction and connection.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetConnectionString(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a connection string from configuration, caching it for subsequent calls.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetOpenConnectionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates and opens a new NpgsqlConnection.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.CreateCommand(System.Data.Common.DbConnection,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Creates and configures a NpgsqlCommand.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and maps results to a list of objects.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetDataSetAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and returns a DataSet.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.ExecuteNonQueryAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a non-query SQL command.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.QuerySingleOrDefaultAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query designed to return a single row or null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryFirstOrDefaultAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and returns the first row or null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.ExecuteScalarAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a query and returns a single scalar value.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.ExistsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if any rows exist for the given query.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.CountAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the count of rows for the given query.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.LongCountAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the long count of rows for the given query.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetPagedAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a paginated SQL query with automatic count query. Uses PostgreSQL LIMIT-OFFSET with parallel query support. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetPagedAsync``1(System.String,System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a paginated SQL query with custom count query. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetPagedFromStoredProcedureAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a paginated stored procedure/function. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetFilteredAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a filtered SQL query with sorting and search capabilities (non-paginated). Automatically builds parameters from FilterRequest and applies ORDER BY clause. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetFilteredFromStoredProcedureAsync``1(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a filtered stored procedure/function (non-paginated). Passes filter criteria to the stored procedure without pagination parameters. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.GetFilteredDataSetAsync(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a filtered query and returns a DataSet (non-paginated). Useful for reports that need multiple result sets with filtering and sorting. Supports flexible filter parameter strategy via CommandOptionsDto.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryMultipleAsync``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes multiple queries in a single batch.
Executes multiple non-query commands in a batch.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BulkInsertAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk insert using PostgreSQL COPY command for optimal performance.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BulkInsertAsync(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk insert from DataTable using PostgreSQL COPY command.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.QueryAsyncEnumerable``1(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams query results as an async enumerable for memory-efficient processing.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilterParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds query parameters from FilterRequest using flexible strategy. Strategy is determined by CommandOptionsDto.UseJsonFilters flag. - UseJsonFilters = false (default): Individual parameters for raw SQL queries - UseJsonFilters = true: JSONB serialized parameters for PostgreSQL functions

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilterParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds query parameters from PaginationRequest using flexible strategy. Strategy is determined by CommandOptionsDto.UseJsonFilters flag.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildStoredProcedureParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds stored procedure/function parameters from FilterRequest. Automatically uses JSON strategy for PostgreSQL functions unless explicitly overridden. Uses PostgreSQL naming conventions (lowercase with underscores).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildStoredProcedureParameters(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds stored procedure/function parameters from PaginationRequest. Automatically uses JSON strategy for PostgreSQL functions unless explicitly overridden. Uses PostgreSQL naming conventions (lowercase with underscores).

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildPaginationMetadata(Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.PaginationRequest,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.CommandOptionsDto)
member.summary: Builds pagination metadata for PagedResult.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.ConvertToSnakeCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to snake_case for PostgreSQL naming conventions.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.BuildFilteredSql(System.String,Acontplus.Core.Dtos.Requests.FilterRequest)
member.summary: Builds filtered SQL with ORDER BY clause based on FilterRequest.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.AdoRepository.ValidateAndSanitizeSortColumn(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and sanitizes sort column names to prevent SQL injection (CWE-89). Uses a strict multi-layer validation approach - regex, length checks, and comprehensive keyword blacklist.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository
member.summary: Dapper-based repository implementation for PostgreSQL. Provides simplified data access with automatic object mapping.
member.remarks:
This implementation uses Dapper for lightweight ORM functionality with:
Automatic type mapping
Retry policies with exponential backoff
Transaction support via Unit of Work
PostgreSQL-specific optimizations (LIMIT-OFFSET pagination)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Lazy-loaded retry policy based on configuration.

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository.DefaultTimeout
member.summary: Gets the default command timeout from configuration.
Constructor for DapperRepository with resilience configuration.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository.GetConnectionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a connection for the operation. Returns a tuple with the connection and whether it should be disposed. When using a shared connection (from UnitOfWork), it should NOT be disposed by the caller. When creating a new connection, it SHOULD be disposed by the caller.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository.ExecuteWithConnectionAsync``1(System.Func{System.Data.Common.DbConnection,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes an operation with proper connection lifecycle management. Automatically handles connection disposal for owned connections only.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository.SafeColumnNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z_a-z].
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Repositories.DapperRepository.SafeFunctionNameRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_.]*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z_a-z].
○ Match a character in the set [.0-9A-Z_a-z] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1
member.summary: Coordinates EF Core and ADO.NET operations within a single transactional unit of work.
member.typeparam: The EF Core database context type.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork`1.#ctor(`0,Acontplus.Core.Abstractions.Persistence.IAdoRepository,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.UnitOfWork.UnitOfWork{`0}})
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: The EF Core database context.
The ADO.NET repository for raw database operations.
Optional logger instance.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.DiagnosticConfig
member.summary: Provides OpenTelemetry diagnostic configuration for the PostgreSQL repository layer.

member.name: F:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.DiagnosticConfig.ActivitySource
member.summary: The used to create diagnostic tracing activities.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.SqlStringParam
member.summary: Provides utilities for sanitizing SQL string parameters to prevent SQL injection.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.SqlStringParam.Sanitize(System.String)
member.summary: Removes common SQL injection patterns from the input string by replacing them with spaces.
member.param: The raw input string to sanitize.
member.returns: The sanitized string with dangerous patterns replaced by spaces.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.StringExtensions
member.summary: String extension methods for PostgreSQL snake_case naming conventions.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.StringExtensions.ToSnakeCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a PascalCase or camelCase string to snake_case.
member.param: The string to convert.
member.returns: The snake_case representation of the input.

member.name: T:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper
member.summary: Provides time zone conversion utilities for Ecuador and server local time.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.ToEcuadorTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: OPCIÓN 1 (RECOMENDADA): Convertir UTC a zona horaria específica

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.ToEcuadorTime(System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Converts a nullable UTC to Ecuador time, returning null if the input is null.
member.param: The nullable UTC date and time.
member.returns: The Ecuador local date and time, or null.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.ToServerTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Converts a UTC to the server's local time zone.
member.param: The UTC date and time to convert.
member.returns: The date and time in the server's local time zone.

member.name: M:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.FromEcuadorTimeToUtc(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Convertir de zona horaria local a UTC (para guardar en BD)

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.NowInEcuador
member.summary: Obtener la hora actual en Ecuador

member.name: P:Acontplus.Persistence.PostgreSQL.Utilities.TimeZoneHelper.NowInServer
member.summary: Obtener la hora actual del servidor

member.summary: Custom -derived type for the SafeColumnNameRegex method.

member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SafeColumnNameRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLettersAndDigitsAndDotUnderscore
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in ".0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiWordChars
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".
